pip_2026-07-14.mp4.title: Pip Presses a Viral Tanghulu! 🍓✨
pip_2026-07-14.mp4.description:
Experiment Log #4011: I found this super shiny, crunchy-looking berry! What could the Mystical Press possibly do to it? 🍓 The sparkly shatter sound it made was my favorite part! ✨ Let me know what other trendy snacks I should investigate next! Pip-pip!
